name: Paramonoclorofenol (medicamento dental)
curation_log: DRAFT generated by the LLM strawman (design §3 step 5) from real corpus samples — cheap and disposable, never authoritative. Requires the full M1 procedure (mining passes, price-discrimination test, expert curation, reference validation) before launch.
Dry run on 50 corpus samples: coverage {'capacidad': 0.4, 'formulacion': 0.68}, illegal extractions 0.

attribute_defs.name: capacidad
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Volumen del frasco; discrimina identidad entre presentaciones reales (3, 10, 20 ml); cc se canoniza a ml (1 cc = 1 ml).

attribute_defs.name: formulacion
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Distingue paramonoclorofenol alcanforado (CMCP, mayoritario) del simple; producto quimicamente distinto, por eso es identity; sin coincidencia queda sin valor (no se asume simple).
